items.title: Tomorrow, Monday, June 29, is the big deadline day around the NBA.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Tomorrow, Monday, June 29, is the big deadline day around the NBA.

All player and team options must be decided upon by tomorrow. Also the deadline for teams to issue qualifying offers to make players restricted free agents this summer.

Free agent negotiations open at 6PM ET on Tuesday, June 30!

items.title: June 28, 1992: The '92 U.S. men's Olympic basketball team takes the floor for the first time—during the preliminary round of the Tournament of the Americas, held in Portland.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 28, 1992: The '92 U.S. men's Olympic basketball team takes the floor for the first time—during the preliminary round of the Tournament of the Americas, held in Portland.

Charles Barkley scored 22 PTS and Clyde Drexler added 20 PTS as the "Dream Team" defeated Cuba, 136-57.

items.title: Here are my simple thoughts on Jaylen Brown:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Here are my simple thoughts on Jaylen Brown:

I'm a big believer in stats/analytics, but if your model tells you that Jaylen Brown is the 7th best player on a team (and it's not Team USA), then you have a problem with your model.

Brown isn't a perfect player, but we all know he's an awesome one.

items.title: Hollander POTD Bobby Hurley. Legendary Duke PG was drafted 7th by SAC in 93. After 19 gms, seriously injured in a car accident. Teammate Mike Peplowski saw the accident & saved his life. Hurley came back in 94-95 but had lost speed. Lasted in NBA til 98 & coached til recently.

items.title: The Minnesota Timberwolves have tendered a qualifying offer to Jaylen Clark and a two-way qualifying offer to Enrique Freeman, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Minnesota Timberwolves have tendered a qualifying offer to Jaylen Clark and a two-way qualifying offer to Enrique Freeman, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Clark and Freeman will now be restricted free agents this offseason. Clark has reportedly agreed to a new deal already.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Raymond Felton. UNC PG was drafted 5th by CHA in 2005. Earned starting job as rook & held it thru 2010. Peaked at 15.5 ppg 8.3 rpg in 2010-11. Also good for NY in 2012-13. Solid player but never a star. One of the better husky short NBA PGs. Retired in 2019.

items.title: Dominant from the Fever. Their lead was in the mid 30s at one point, and they roll to a 111-87 win over the Sparks. Kelsey Mitchell with an easy 26 points. Season-best performance from Ty Harris. Fever are 11-8 with 10 days before their next game.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Dominant from the Fever. Their lead was in the mid 30s at one point, and they roll to a 111-87 win over the Sparks. Kelsey Mitchell with an easy 26 points. Season-best performance from Ty Harris. Fever are 11-8 with 10 days before their next game.

items.title: Fever cruise to a 111-87 win over the Sparks — as good as it gets before enjoying a week between games.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever cruise to a 111-87 win over the Sparks — as good as it gets before enjoying a week between games.

11 Fever players scored. Four starters with 15+, led by Kelsey Mitchell's 26. They finished with shooting %: 55-53-82.

Next: July 5 at Las Vegas

items.title: The 236 combined points allowed by the Los Angeles Sparks over the last two games are the most ever in WNBA history, and it marks the FOURTH(!!!!) time the league record has been broken in the last week.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The 236 combined points allowed by the Los Angeles Sparks over the last two games are the most ever in WNBA history, and it marks the FOURTH(!!!!) time the league record has been broken in the last week.

items.title: Watching Dominique Malonga and Awa Fam just figure things out in real time has been fun. The combination of the confidence growing with their versatility...you can just see it.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt: Watching Dominique Malonga and Awa Fam just figure things out in real time has been fun. The combination of the confidence growing with their versatility...you can just see it.

items.title: Fever clearly having a great time tonight. Bree Hall shot fake, then a drive to the cup and she's got a massive smile. She chest bumps former college teammate Raven Johnson after a stop on the other end. Fever up 34.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Fever clearly having a great time tonight. Bree Hall shot fake, then a drive to the cup and she's got a massive smile. She chest bumps former college teammate Raven Johnson after a stop on the other end. Fever up 34.
